Ryan replaced the 3L manual reviewer route with one direct sanitized Claude CLI run using claude-fable-5 at max effort; read-only tools, plan mode, no session persistence, no model fallback, and all existing protected boundaries remain required.

The exact claude-fable-5 max-effort review completed successfully and endorsed 4C first with high confidence; Codex intaked its scope and sequence changes, resolved source-level questions locally, and moved 3L to awaiting-confirmation for four Ryan decisions without implementation.

Ryan confirmed all four post-review Task 8 decisions; work block 3L and Phase 3 closed, Phase 4 activated for planning, and 4C Transaction Identity Foundation was recorded as proposed without implementation authorization.

issues.title: Recurring workflow inactivity remains possible but monitored
issues.summary: Active automation expense-tracker-daily-plaid-sync-monitor now detects disabled state, stale scheduled runs, unsuccessful runs, and runs incomplete beyond the delay window without automatic recovery.

issues.title: Daily Plaid Sync runs at the start of the hour
issues.summary: Resolved by PR 83: the cron now uses minute 17; the resulting Fly Deploy passed and the workflow remained active.

issues.title: Project documentation contradicts current architecture
issues.summary: Resolved and released through PR 85 as 216a992 by establishing tracked AGENTS.md as canonical and retiring competing legacy guidance in place; Fly Deploy and production HTTP health passed.

issues.title: Planning foundations lack tracked regression and demo goal evidence
issues.summary: Work block 4E added maintained all-route LL denial, unchanged-database, account-name non-disclosure, and Personal/BFM boundary checks; broad planning calculations and lifecycle coverage plus demo goals and snapshots remain parked.

issues.title: Transaction identity can collapse distinct transactions
issues.summary: Work blocks 3A and 3G showed that imported rows or different Plaid IDs sharing date, amount, and description collapse to one transaction even when accounts differ; exact Plaid re-delivery remains idempotent and real-data occurrence is unknown.

issues.title: Transaction edit, split, and effective-reporting paths lack tracked regression coverage
issues.summary: The 3A ephemeral probe passed edit, split, cross-entity denial, and reporting replacement behavior, but the tracked smoke suite does not guard those paths.

issues.title: Vendor-payment matching references a missing transaction column
issues.summary: Resolved and released through 4M-4M-R: vendor matching uses vendor_transactions.matched_transaction_id canonically; source commit ffd42dd deployed through successful automatic Fly run 29748373589 and credential-free health returned 200.

issues.title: Vendor-order imports discard parsed line items
issues.summary: Resolved locally in 4N: normal Amazon and Henry Schein saves persist new parents and children atomically with exact cents and reimport identity; rollback, route handoff, auto-split consumption, all-entity isolation, and cleanup pass without migration or backfill.

issues.title: Vendor categorization can escape the category source of truth
issues.summary: Synthetic matching wrote an undefined category in all three entities, mixed-category ties varied across hash seeds, and the categorization endpoint accepted undefined category and subcategory values.

issues.title: Task 2 import and categorization paths lack tracked regression coverage
issues.summary: Work block 4N adds maintained Amazon and Henry parent-child, route handoff, exact reimport, rollback, integer-cents, auto-split, all-entity isolation, denied-network, and cleanup coverage; remaining import, matching, alias, category-domain, and undo paths stay paired with later repairs.

issues.title: Upload Undo label does not explain its status-only effect
issues.summary: The action marks the monthly checklist incomplete but leaves imported transactions intact, while the interface labels it only Undo.

issues.title: Recurring Charges report executes an uninterpolated SQL helper
issues.summary: Resolved and released through work blocks 4H-4H-R: the entity-specific query and correct debit min/max ordering are durable on main, maintained all-entity coverage passes, automatic Fly deployment succeeded, and credential-free production health returned 200.

issues.title: Task 3 financial read-model paths lack tracked regression coverage
issues.summary: The 3C ephemeral probe produced 297 passing assertions across dashboard, reports, exports, subscriptions, cash flow, and isolation, but the tracked smoke suite does not guard the full read model or recurring-report failure.

issues.title: Locked payoff schedules ignore stored account APRs
issues.summary: The direct payoff engine honors supplied rates, but lock-plan hard-codes every linked card to 20 percent and sent avalanche's extra payment to the lower-APR synthetic card because it appeared first.

issues.title: Luxe Legacy planning denial is enforced only on page entry
issues.summary: Resolved and released through work block 4E-R: two early blueprint guards and maintained 21-route handler-non-entry, unchanged-database, non-disclosure, and Personal/BFM preservation checks are durable on main; automatic Fly deployment and credential-free health passed.

issues.title: Automatic goal snapshots erase same-day review notes
issues.summary: Resolved locally in work block 4T: identity-stable same-day upserts preserve manual notes during automatic balance refresh and keep manual replacement explicit with maintained coverage.

issues.title: Negative asset appreciation is treated as zero growth
issues.summary: Resolved locally in 4U: positive and negative nonzero rates share the existing compound formula zero rates remain linear and maintained item entity combined isolation denied-network and cleanup checks pass.

issues.title: Weekly historical views mix selected and current dates
issues.summary: Historical pace used today's month length, historical recurring/card bills were omitted, and a cross-month burn window reversed the synthetic budget-health conclusion.

issues.title: Weekly credit-card bills use full balance instead of scheduled payment
issues.summary: A card titled 50 dollars due contributed its full 1,200 dollar balance to the row and weekly bill total.

issues.title: Waterfall payoff average excludes deficit months
issues.summary: The labeled three-month average used only positive months, producing 1,750 dollars instead of the signed 500 dollar average in the synthetic history.

issues.title: Invalid Weekly paydown dates persist and break the page
issues.summary: A direct POST saved a malformed date and the next Weekly read raised ValueError while parsing it.

issues.title: Waterfall can report zero months while debt remains
issues.summary: The payoff helper rounds a fractional month to zero when positive debt is less than half one month of positive surplus.

issues.title: Waterfall tax fallback can disagree with display and fail on non-finite input
issues.summary: A 100 percent input displayed 100 while calculations used the 22 percent fallback, and a direct nan value raised ValueError.

issues.title: Weekly and Waterfall paths lack tracked regression coverage
issues.summary: The 3E temporary probes verified current behavior and reproduced six defects, but the tracked smoke suite has no dedicated Weekly or Waterfall cases.

issues.title: Non-BFM entities can directly access and mutate payroll
issues.summary: Resolved locally in work block 4D: one payroll blueprint guard denies Personal and Luxe Legacy before storage or parsing, with maintained all-route coverage and unchanged-state checks.

issues.title: Payroll preview duplicates an exact existing employee
issues.summary: The rendered preview defaulted an exact same-name roster match to Create new employee, and submitting that default created a duplicate roster row for the imported paycheck.

issues.title: Payroll peer averages mix hourly and salary units
issues.summary: Resolved locally in work block 4R: other active same-role same-pay-type peers drive explicit numeric-zero and empty-null comparisons with correct display units and maintained coverage.

issues.title: Payroll employee inputs are not safely normalized
issues.summary: Undefined roles persist while invalid pay type and non-finite rate requests raise instead of returning controlled validation responses.

issues.title: Canceling payroll preview retains the parsed payload
issues.summary: Successful save consumes its temp JSON, but Cancel leaves parsed employee, date, amount, and filename data until four-hour age cleanup.

issues.title: Malformed payroll XLSX raises instead of returning an import error
issues.summary: Non-XLSX bytes carrying an xlsx filename propagate a parser ValueError rather than rendering the controlled import-error state.

issues.title: Payroll lifecycle paths lack tracked regression coverage
issues.summary: Resolved locally through work blocks 4D 4P 4Q and 4R: maintained synthetic coverage now spans every repaired payroll boundary import retention validation rollback and compensation-cohort behavior.

issues.title: Plaid persistence errors can advance the cursor past missing data
issues.summary: A forced SQLite insert failure was swallowed as a zero insert, returned no sync error, and allowed the Plaid cursor to commit beyond the absent transaction.

issues.title: Plaid balance reconciliation is unsafe on disabled or partially failed items
issues.summary: A successful sibling refresh deleted the failed item's cached balance row, while an all-disabled item retained its stale balance because the keep-set was empty.

issues.title: Normal Cash Flow refresh skips Plaid liabilities
issues.summary: Balance refresh writes a fresh timestamp before the liability cache check, so the normal stale-load path never fetched or applied minimum payment and due-date data.

issues.title: Linking a Plaid institution can delete unrelated manual accounts
issues.summary: The first-word cleanup heuristic removed a distinct manual Chase balance when mocked Chase account data was linked.

issues.title: Plaid balance freshness uses an entity-wide maximum
issues.summary: One fresh Plaid balance suppressed refresh even while a sibling account row was two hours stale.

issues.title: Missing Plaid modified rows are reported as updated
issues.summary: A mocked modified event targeting no stored Plaid ID reported one update because the code increments without checking affected-row count.

issues.title: One corrupt Plaid token aborts valid sibling items
issues.summary: All tokens are decrypted before the per-item error boundary, so one corrupt ciphertext prevented a healthy sibling item from syncing.

issues.title: Primary Plaid paths lack tracked regression coverage
issues.summary: The 3G probes verified normal primary Plaid behavior and reproduced eight defects, but the tracked smoke suite only renders Connected Accounts and guards none of the account, balance, liability, sync, cursor, or failure paths.

issues.title: Scheduled Plaid sync can report partial failure as success
issues.summary: Resolved locally in 4G: nested entity errors now return HTTP 502 with truthful partial or total failure status, successful skips remain successful, per-entity results are preserved, and actual localhost curl-fail verification exits 22.

issues.title: Scheduled and public sync paths lack shared cross-process coordination
issues.summary: The two paths use distinct process-local locks and the public throttle is also process-local while production runs two Gunicorn workers.

issues.title: Public background sync advances past removed Plaid events
issues.summary: A mocked removed event left the transaction stored while the public worker committed the next cursor.

issues.title: Public background sync includes vendor Plaid items
issues.summary: The public worker selected is_vendor rows and consumed them through the normal spending transaction and cursor path.

issues.title: One scheduled entity exception aborts healthy later entities
issues.summary: A BFM exception returned a generic 500 and prevented Luxe Legacy from running without a structured partial completion result.

issues.title: Sync-all runs entity setup before bearer validation
issues.summary: A missing-bearer request was rejected only after normal entity database initialization and category synchronization ran.

issues.title: Failed public worker launch consumes its throttle window
issues.summary: The public route updates its last-sync timestamp before starting the daemon thread, so a launch failure suppresses retry in that worker for 15 minutes.

issues.title: Background sync entry points lack tracked regression coverage
issues.summary: Work block 4G added maintained sync-all result, bearer, configuration, contention, exception, lock-release, entity-order, result-preservation, secret-safe, and curl-fail coverage; public worker and remaining entry-point coverage stay parked.

issues.title: Luxe Legacy Owner Draw is mirrored despite the exclusion intent
issues.summary: Resolved locally in 4F: the bridge now excludes maintained LL Owner Draw, and focused mocked coverage preserves valid LL rows plus LL-only invocation without database mutation or network access.

issues.title: Luxe Legacy mirror idempotency permits duplicate conflict keys
issues.summary: The local schema admitted duplicate Plaid IDs into one request while the downstream conflict target remained implicit and actual remote behavior unverified.

issues.title: Luxe Legacy mirror accepts empty Plaid transaction IDs
issues.summary: The bridge's IS NOT NULL predicate admitted an empty-string Plaid ID as a downstream idempotency key.

issues.title: Luxe Legacy downstream mirror lacks tracked regression coverage
issues.summary: Partly addressed in 4F: maintained coverage now exercises Owner Draw selection, valid LL eligibility, LL-only storage and invocation, unchanged databases, mocked HTTP, and denied sockets; broader mirror contract coverage remains parked.

issues.title: Main authentication boundary returns protected HTML and accepts a client-exposed digest
issues.summary: Resolved and released through work blocks 4A-4B and PR 86; production protected root now redirects before rendering and the standalone login contains no legacy digest flow.

issues.title: PWA cache can serve protected content across entity and session state
issues.summary: Resolved and released through work blocks 4A-4B and PR 86; production service-worker v4 matches the static/offline-only contract and the browser probe proved old-cache deletion and offline entity isolation.

issues.title: Public dashboard exposes detailed Personal and Luxe Legacy financial information
issues.summary: The intentionally unauthenticated route excludes BFM but includes transaction names, dates, amounts, categories, budget progress, and selected balances for Personal and Luxe Legacy.

issues.title: Client and server authentication modes can drift
issues.summary: Resolved and released through work blocks 4A-4B and PR 86 by eliminating independent client auth state and covering legacy, Werkzeug, invalid, and no-password modes.

issues.title: Mobile sidebar lacks complete keyboard, focus, and scroll handling
issues.summary: The drawer opens and closes from its scrim but does not move focus, lock background scrolling, or close on Escape.

issues.title: Session cookie and browser security policy need explicit hardening
issues.summary: Synthetic HTTPS responses used an HttpOnly session cookie without explicit Secure or SameSite attributes, and protected HTML lacked CSP.

issues.title: PWA, public, auth, and responsive boundaries lack tracked regression coverage
issues.summary: Work block 4A added tracked auth, CSRF, safe-redirect, no-store, public/exempt route, and service-worker source contracts; maintained browser, manifest, exact public-field, and responsive-navigation coverage remains.
